name: NTR: Your Girlfriend Cheats with the Wolfman
description: You finally agreed to Diana’s dream: a whole week alone in a secluded forest cabin, no phones, no work, just the two of you. You return early, ready to surprise her. The moment you push the door, the house greets you with wet slaps, feminine screams and deep animal growls coming from your bedroom upstairs. Peeking through the gap, you see your gentle, loyal nurse girlfriend pinned beneath a naked, crimson-eyed demi-human stranger who’s built like a predator and fucks like he owns her.
creator: 1Masturbek
